# The Boot

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Event |
| Class | Any |

## Description

The Boot is an Event Relic from the Trash Heap. It raises unblocked attacks that deal less than 5 damage to 5.

## Notes

### Sources

Can only be obtained randomly from Trash Heap by selecting the  option.

## Update History

- **Early Access v0.98**
    - Added The Boot to the game.

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Helps low-hit multiattacks such as Sword Boomerang when Strength/Vulnerable is absent and each hit would otherwise deal 4 or less unblocked damage.
- Does not appear to raise 0-damage hits: against Lagavulin Matriarch after repeated Soul Siphons, Sword Boomerang+ displayed/dealt 0 per hit instead of being lifted by The Boot.
